item.title: IT Training Resources Online: Free and Paid Courses for Every Specialization
item.category: "IT training online" , "free IT courses" , "Professor Messer" , "CBT Nuggets" , "Pluralsight IT" , "AWS Skill Builder" , "Microsoft Learn" , "TryHackMe" , "IT certification study" , "IT online courses 2026"
item.description: The best free and paid online IT training resources — from Professor Messer for CompTIA certs to AWS Skill Builder, Microsoft Learn, Pluralsight, and hands-on lab platforms.
